output: Implemented the final verification pass for T6. I added the missing automated coverage for `resolveTaskProjectScope()` fallback and prefetch/store seeding, ran the required grep audits, created and executed a temporary repro proving unrelated task updates do not rerender an unrelated selector subscription, deleted that repro, then completed focused tests, `npx tsc --noEmit`, and a full `npm test` run. Human-only gallery rerender and telemetry-overlay checks were skipped as required because there is no browser-driving path available in this executor.

task_updates.executor_notes: Closed the verification loop for the realtime task-store migration. Added missing automated coverage in `src/shared/hooks/tasks/__tests__/useTasks.test.ts` and `src/shared/hooks/tasks/__tests__/useTaskPrefetch.test.ts` for `resolveTaskProjectScope()` fallback and canonical prefetch seeding through the selected-project fallback path. Ran grep audits confirming no `RealtimeContext` consumers remain outside `src/shared/providers/RealtimeProvider.tsx` and only `src/shared/hooks/tasks/useTasks.ts` still references `taskQueryKeys.single(...)` in `src/`. Wrote and ran a short throwaway reproduction test proving an update to task A does not rerender a task-B selector subscription, then deleted it. Focused verification passed with `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/state/realtimeStore.test.ts src/shared/providers/__tests__/RealtimeProvider.test.tsx src/shared/hooks/tasks/__tests__/useTasks.test.ts src/shared/hooks/tasks/__tests__/useTaskPrefetch.test.ts src/shared/lib/__tests__/generationTaskCache.test.ts src/shared/hooks/__tests__/usePendingGenerationTasks.test.ts src/shared/hooks/tasks/__tests__/useTaskStatusCounts.test.ts src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/taskDetails/useVariantSourceTask.test.ts src/shared/components/TaskDetails/hooks/__tests__/useGenerationTaskDetails.test.ts`; `npx tsc --noEmit` passed; `npm test` passed with 886 files / 4573 tests. Deferred-human rerender verification was skipped on first encounter because there is no browser-driving path or telemetry overlay path available in this executor.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. The change is covered by updated automated tests for project-scope fallback and prefetch seeding, grep audits for stale broadcast usage and `taskQueryKeys.single(...)`, a temporary reproduction test that was run and deleted, `npx tsc --noEmit`, and a green `npm test` run (886 files, 4573 tests). Browser-only gallery rerender and telemetry-overlay verification were explicitly skipped as deferred-human because no browser-driving path is available in this executor.
